extension.summary: Subtitle Translator — Gemini AI + Google Translate
extension.description:
Translate subtitles directly from the Kodi Download Subtitles menu.
FEATURES: - Translate any SRT subtitle to 100+ languages - Gemini AI translation for natural, story-aware results - Google Translate fallback (free, no key needed) - Subtitle timing sync — adjust early or late subtitles - Custom time shift support - Remembers your last used language - Browse any folder or Kodi temp folder
GEMINI AI SETUP (optional — for better translation quality): 1. Go to aistudio.google.com 2. Sign in with your Google account 3. Click Get API Key then Create API Key 4. Copy the key 5. Open Download Subtitles in Kodi 6. Tap Gemini API Key in the menu 7. Paste your key using the keyboard
GEMINI FREE TIER LIMITS: - Gemini 2.5 Flash: 250 requests per day (approx 10 movies) - Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite: 1000 requests per day (approx 43 movies) - Gemini 2.5 Pro: 100 requests per day (approx 4 movies) - Limits reset daily at midnight Pacific Time - If limit reached, addon automatically falls back to Google Translate
HOW TO USE: 1. Play a video in Kodi 2. Press T or open OSD Subtitles Download Subtitles 3. Select Subtitle Translator from the provider list 4. Browse for your SRT or ZIP subtitle file 5. Select target language 6. Select timing adjustment if needed 7. Translation runs automatically and subtitle loads into video
extension.news: v1.1.0 - Added Gemini AI support, timing sync, custom time shift v1.0.0 - Initial release with Google Translate
